message:
fix(ft-data): guard BatchSampler against zero batch_size; add sampler edge-case tests (frankentorch-4i2)

BatchSampler::batches() returned an infinite loop when batch_size was 0;
now returns an empty Vec immediately. WeightedRandomSampler binary_search_by
switched to total_cmp to avoid unwrap on NaN weights.

Added 18 new tests covering: RandomSampler determinism, seed independence,
truncated without-replacement, empty dataset; WeightedRandomSampler
determinism, empty weights, single weight, infinity weight sanitization,
zero num_samples; SubsetRandomSampler determinism; BatchSampler from subset,
empty indices, zero batch_size, exact division with/without drop_last;
DataLoaderConfig builder chain; DataLoader with weighted sampler;
random_split partial coverage with non-overlap check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
